summary: Critical gaps: Deliverable is incomplete. Task requires RED/GREEN TDD with tests FIRST, fixtures, and act-result.txt artifact — none provided. Workflow references pytest tests/test_license_checker.py (not shown) and fixtures (not shown). Action refs use v4/v5 instead of full commit SHAs, violating pinning requirement (lines 12-13). Python script itself is well-written (clear types, error handling, modularity, docstrings) but cannot be validated without test file. Workflow will fail at line 21: `pytest tests/test_license_checker.py` because test file not provided. Missing required act-result.txt validation output. Incomplete deliverable.
